title: Confusing drop message after server restart
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce
### How to reproduce
Create a MergeTree table:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
```
Restart the server and drop twice:
```sql
DROP TABLE t0 SYNC;
DROP TABLE t0 SYNC;
--DB::Exception: Table default.t0 does not exist. Maybe you meant default.t0?. (UNKNOWN_TABLE)
```
The error message on the second DROP doesn't make sense. If I ran everything without restarting the server, I would get the error: `DB::Exception: Table default.t0 does not exist. (UNKNOWN_TABLE)` which seems much better.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 60. DB::Exception: Table default.t0 does not exist. Maybe you meant default.t0?. (UNKNOWN_TABLE), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000025128232

2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d3008ce
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d300411

5. src/Databases/IDatabase.cpp:44: DB::IDatabase::getTable(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001a810bbd
6. src/Interpreters/DatabaseCatalog.cpp:480: DB::DatabaseCatalog::getTableImpl(DB::StorageID const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::optional<DB::Exception>*) const @ 0x000000001b52d2ec
7. src/Interpreters/DatabaseCatalog.cpp:1088: DB::DatabaseCatalog::getDatabaseAndTable(DB::StorageID const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001b53423d
8. src/Interpreters/InterpreterDropQuery.cpp:151: DB::InterpreterDropQuery::executeToTableImpl(std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const> const&, DB::ASTDropQuery&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IDatabase>&, StrongTypedef<wide::integer<128ul, unsigned int>, DB::UUIDTag>&) @ 0x000000001b641758
9. src/Interpreters/InterpreterDropQuery.cpp:123: DB::InterpreterDropQuery::executeToTable(DB::ASTDropQuery&) @ 0x000000001b640d9f
10. src/Interpreters/InterpreterDropQuery.cpp:96: DB::InterpreterDropQuery::executeSingleDropQuery(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&) @ 0x000000001b6402a5
11. src/Interpreters/InterpreterDropQuery.cpp:77: DB::InterpreterDropQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001b63fee5
12. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1746: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>, DB::QueryResultDetails&) @ 0x000000001ba26de0
13. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1967: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001ba1ee52
14. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:777: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001ef103aa
15. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2873: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001ef2b024
16. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x00000000251e0147
```

poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
key_bug_features: Dropping a table after server restart
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE id > 1;
